items.title: From Missteps to Momentum: Jack in the Box’s Comeback Plan
items.description: Jack in the Box is well positioned to effect a significant recovery in its share price and business, potentially delivering investors a triple-digit gain.

items.title: McDonald's $120B Real Estate Portfolio Paves the Way to Its 50th Consecutive Dividend Hike
items.description: McDonald's collects reliable royalties and rent from its vast footprint of restaurants around the world.
